zh.Upper Wallop, Hampshire, England: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾索莫斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Pyle於1519年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普時，他的父親William Pyle19歲，母親Agnes Hancock Bartlett19歲。他於1549年8月8日與Phillis Bassett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾索莫斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1605年9月9日在他的家鄉享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Pyle于1519年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普时，他的父亲William Pyle19岁，母亲Agnes Hancock Bartlett19岁。他于1549年8月8日与Phillis Bassett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾索莫斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1605年9月9日在他的家乡享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pile ‘stake, post’ (via Old English from Latin pilum ‘spike, javelin’), hence a topographic name for someone who lived near a stake or post serving as a landmark, or sometimes perhaps a nickname for a tall thin person.
Americanized form of Dutch Pijl: metonymic occupational name for a marksman or an arrowsmith, from pijl ‘arrow’.

variants.name: Pile
meanings: English (Devon and London): variant of   Pyle  .

French: from Old French pile ‘mortar, trough’ (from Latin pila), denoting a trough used for crushing or pounding various materials, such as lime, and in some cases the surname may have arisen as a metonymic occupational name for someone engaged in such work.
French: topographic name from Old French pile ‘pillar, column’ (from Latin pila), or a habitational name from any of the minor places in northern France named with this word.

variants.name: Pyles
meanings: English: variant of Piles, itself a variant of Pyle with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Pyle was born in 1519, in Over Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Pyle, was 19 and his mother, Agnes Hancock Bartlett, was 19. He married Phillis Bassett on 8 August 1549, in Somers, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 September 1605, in his hometown, at the age of 86.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Pyleが1519年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアオバー ワロップで生まれた時，父William Pyleは19歳，母Agnes Hancock Bartlettは19歳であった。1549年8月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアソメルズでPhillis Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1605年9月9日に故郷で86歳で死去した。

ko.Upper Wallop, Hampshire, England: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 서머스
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Pyle(이)가 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 버 월로프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pyle(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Hancock Bartlett(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1549년 8월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 서머스에서 Phillis Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1605년 9월 9일 그의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Upper Wallop, Hampshire, England: сомирс, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Pyle родился в 1519 г. в местности овир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Pyle было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hancock Bartlett, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Phillis Bassett 8 августа 1549 г. в местности сомирс, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1605 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 86 лет.
